title: kubernetes_cluster
description: One managed Kubernetes cluster — AWS EKS, GCP GKE, Azure AKS. The single cross-vendor shape policies use for secrets-encryption, logging, and network-isolation checks.

id.description: Unique stable identifier (EKS: cluster ARN, GKE: cluster ID).

provider.description: Cloud provider short name: aws, gcp, azure.

secrets_encryption_enabled.description: Kubernetes secrets are encrypted at rest with an envelope encryption key.

logging_enabled.description: Control-plane logging (audit, API server) is enabled.

is_private_endpoint.description: Cluster API server endpoint is private (not publicly accessible).

node_auto_upgrade_enabled.description: Nodes are configured for automatic patch/version upgrades.
